code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_number = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 43 or b == 45
    if is_digit
      if not in_number
        in_number = true
        current = 0
        sign = 1
      end
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_sign and not in_number
      in_number = true
      current = 0
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else
        sign = 1
      end
    else
      if in_number
        sum = sum + sign * current
        count = count + 1
        in_number = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_number
    sum = sum + sign * current
    count = count + 1
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
